title: Public records; effect of this Part
doc_html:
§1238.  Public records; effect of this Part

Nothing in this Part shall be construed to supersede the provisions of Chapter 1 of Title 44 of the Revised Statutes of 1950 to the extent that those provisions otherwise apply.

Acts 1987, No. 174, §1.
